task: I need to send a quick group chat message about a change in our school plan, and I want it to be clear enough that people know what’s happening. What’s a simple way to word it so I can choose the version that feels right?

turns.agent_response:
Here are a few simple group chat versions you can choose from:

**Very short:**  
“Hey, our school plan changed a bit. I’ll send the updated info here.”

**Clear and casual:**  
“Quick update: our school plan changed, so I’m sending the new details here.”

**A little more specific:**  
“Hey everyone, there’s been a change in our school plan. I’ll post the updated info so we’re all on the same page.”

**More direct:**  
“Just letting you know our school plan changed. Please check the updated details I send next.”

If you want, I can also make it sound **more casual, more formal, or more natural for your group chat**.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear enough. The casual one is probably best for a group chat.
